nextjs: A React-based framework for building production-ready web applications with built-in routing, API routes, and optimization features.
tailwind: A utility-first CSS framework that speeds up styling with pre-defined classes for responsive and modern UI.
postgresql: A powerful open-source relational database known for reliability, strong ACID compliance, and advanced SQL features.
docker: A containerization platform that packages applications and dependencies into portable containers for consistent deployment.

proxmox: A virtualization platform for running virtual machines and containers, often used to manage home lab or on-premise infrastructure.
git: A distributed version control system for tracking code changes and collaborating efficiently in software projects.
figma: A collaborative design tool for creating UI/UX mockups, prototypes, and responsive layouts in real time.
